name: Slow Lick Dog Feeding Mat - Boots & Barkley™ Sage Green
description:
Make mealtime more engaging with this Slow Feed Mat from Boots & Barkley™. Designed with built-in silicone bowls for kibble, wet food or water, it helps promote slower eating for better digestion. The different textures provide sensory stimulation, making mealtime fun and enriching.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
